title: cotoneaster rotundifolius var. uva-ursi
intro: Cotoneaster rotundifolius var. uva-ursi, also known as the bearberry cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to China, characterized by its small, oval-shaped leaves and red berries. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the high concentration of arbutin, a glycoside with antimicrobial and antidiabetic effects. The health benefits of Cotoneaster rotundifolius var. uva-ursi include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries of the plant are often used to create teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections and other conditions.
